summary: Hyun Ky has been observing Joo Yeohoon's group, noting their suspicious lack of focus on points and their intense interest in him. Intending to subtly distance himself, Hyun Ky leads Rachel towards a grizzly bear, only to be drawn into an apparent ambush orchestrated by someone named Djinn. Hyun Ky quickly realizes that Yeohoon's group is faking their injuries, suggesting they are part of a trap. Rachel and Nayuni intervene as Djinn attacks, but Djinn manages to escape, leaving the true intentions of Yeohoon's group unclear.
key_moments: Hyun Ky notices Joo Yeohoon's group's unusual behavior and their focus on him instead of accumulating points.
Hyun Ky leads Rachel to a grizzly bear, hoping to use the distraction to separate himself from Yeohoon's group.
Djinn attacks Yeohoon's group, prompting Hyun Ky to realize their supposed injuries are fake and part of a setup.
Rachel and Nayuni join the fray against Djinn, who eventually flees, leaving the others unharmed but confused about Yeohoon's group's true involvement.
